properties.displayName: KLZ — Microsoft Defender for AI Workloads must be enabled (AINE)
properties.description: AuditIfNotExists for Microsoft Defender for AI Workloads (formerly Defender for AI Services) on the subscription. The expected resource is Microsoft.Security/pricings named 'AI' with pricingTier 'Standard'. Surfaces shadow-AI activity, prompt-shield bypass attempts and other AI threat signals into Defender CSPM. This is an AuditIfNotExists definition so it never deploys anything by itself; the operator opts in via a separate DeployIfNotExists policy or manual configuration.
